user_system_path: Owner-facing Slack card-quality fix: the 'Decision lock' write_document fallback (lib/briefing/generator.ts buildDecisionEnforcedFallbackPayload) built a 9-section, heavily-redundant body that didn't fit one screen. Collapsed to one Source line + one paragraph per the issue's drafted diff; two production validation gates (forcing-function date check, pressure/consequence keyword check) widened so the collapse doesn't silently fall through to do_nothing.
allowed_files_raw: Allow-by-default-minus-forbidden (friction reduction, owner-directed 2026-06-22). The real guard is forbidden_file_patterns + the proof doctrine, not a whitelist.
forbidden_files_raw: HARD RAILS: No Stripe, Scout (lib/scout — the outward R6 rung re-enters only behind owner sign-off + new anti-fabrication guardrails), schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. No BLIND loosening of positive_winner_contract or the discrepancy-card quality gate — every gate change carries a test + before/after read. R1's own-activity carve-out is additive (does not weaken the external-entity requirement for any other class).
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck; npx vitest run lib/briefing lib/workday-presence lib/cron (1245 green incl. updated decision-enforced-fallback.test.ts + generator-runtime.test.ts)
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): trigger a heartbeat after the fix lands and read the actual rendered Slack message in #foldera-self-loop for a real Decision lock card — confirm it now fits one screen, no scroll.
browser_proof_command: manual: trigger the proactive-delivery heartbeat for 2cbc1bab and inspect the posted Decision lock card in #foldera-self-loop.
acceptance_condition: gate:continuity green + vitest green + PR merged + live Decision lock card confirmed one-screen by owner.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations

decision_enforcement gates (missing_forcing_function, missing_pressure_or_consequence, missing_owner_assignment) still fire correctly on the new one-paragraph Decision lock shape — verified via the repaired-artifact regression tests, not just the new-shape happy path
no loosening of any existing quality gate; no auto-send
stop_condition: #589 PR merged; owner confirms a live Decision lock card fits one screen with no scroll.
next_command: #589 follow-ups named in the issue: review the same redundancy in the behavioral_pattern write_document branch and LLM-generated multi-step cards; decide whether formatDraftLedText's footer should dedupe against the body.
